mix2025conflictA.title: Intervention X Improves Outcome Y
mix2025conflictA.abstract: The study found significant improvement in outcome Y with intervention X. Results show positive effects and effective response across cohorts.

mix2025conflictB.title: Intervention X Shows Negative Outcome Y Effects
mix2025conflictB.abstract: Our analysis found a decrease in outcome Y and negative effects in vulnerable groups. The intervention appears ineffective in this context.

mix2024method.title: Methodological Notes on Confounding in Cohort Studies
mix2024method.abstract: We discuss confound management and sampling caveats. However, small sample groups may bias the estimates.
